title: コマンド/vote が正常に作動しているか徹底的に調査してください
summary_text: 残存ドリフトは以下のみです。 - [auto-vote.sh](/Users/masayuki/.claude/hooks/auto-vote.sh) vs [auto-vote.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers/claude-config/hooks/auto-vote.sh): **差分なし（IDENTICAL）** - [validate-gates.js](/Users/masayuki/.claude/hooks/quality-gates/validate-gates.js) vs [validate-gates.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers/claude-config/hooks/quality-gates/validate-gates.js): **差分なし（IDENTICAL）** - [vote-parser.js](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/vote-parser.js) vs [vote-parser.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers/claude-config/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/vote-parser.js): **差分なし（IDENTICAL）** - [consensus-vote.js](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/consensus-vote.js) vs [consensus-vote.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers/claude-config/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/consensus-vote.js): **2点のみ差分** 1. 空行1行（`preflight.unavailable` 直後）の有無。 2. runtime側のみ、除外provider表示あり: - `if (unavailable.length > 0) {` - `console.log(\` ⚠️ Excluded: ${unavailable.join(', ')}\`);` - `}` 位置: runtime [consensus-vote.js](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/consensus-vote.js#L538), source [consensus-vote.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers/claude-config/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/consensus-vote.js#L539) - [settings.json](/Users/masayuki/.claude/settings.json) vs [settings.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers/claude-config/settings.json): **/vote関連の残存差分** 1. runtimeのみ `PreToolUse` に env guard フック追加（`Read|Bash -> pretooluse_env_guard.py`） runtime: [settings.json](/Users/masayuki/.claude/settings.json#L419) source: 該当ブロックなし 2. `auto-vote.sh` フックは両方とも `Bash|Edit|Write` / `timeout: 160` で一致 runtime: [settings.json](/Users/masayuki/.claude/settings.json#L429) source: [settings.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers/claude-config/settings.json#L215) 3. runtimeのみ `PreToolUse` に `Task -> entire-hook.sh pre-task` 追加 runtime: [settings.json](/Users/masayuki/.claude/settings.json#L439) source: 該当ブロックなし 4. `permissions.dangerouslySkipPermissions` が不一致 runtime: `false` [settings.json](/Users/masayuki/.claude/settings.json#L136) source: `true` [settings.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers/claude-config/settings.json#L33)
